name: Chicken & Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Low-calorie Italian dressing (store bought or homemade)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions, then chill in ice water and drain.
2. Blanch broccoli in boiling water, chill in ice water, and drain.
3. Season chicken with half the soy sauce and heat olive oil in a non-stick pan. Brown the chicken and reduce heat to finish cooking without overcooking it.
4. Slice the cooked chicken into 1-inch strips, then cut into 1/4-inch pieces. Place them in a bowl with the remaining ingredients except for dressing and the remaining soy sauce.
5. Mix the remaining soy sauce into the dressing and pour over the pasta, chicken, and vegetables. Gently toss and serve immediately. You may like to leave the pasta, chicken, and broccoli unchilled and serve it semi-warm.
